headline: Corning (GLW) Stock Valuation Check After Strong Year-To-Date Rally And Recent Pullback
summary: Corning stock snapshot after recent performance moves Corning (GLW) has drawn fresh attention after a sharp swing in recent performance, with the stock up about 95% year to date but down around 11% over the past month. See our latest analysis for Corning. That recent pullback sits against a strong backdrop, with Corning’s share price return up sharply year to date while the 1 year and 3 year total shareholder returns are very large, suggesting momentum has been strong over a longer stretch...

headline: Global Optical Waveguide Market Set to Hit $9.5 Billion by 2028: Size, Share & Forecast Analysis
summary: Delray Beach, FL, June 12, 2026 (GLOBE NEWSWIRE) -- The report "Optical Waveguide Market by Type (Planar, Channel), Material (Glass, Polymer, Semiconductor), Propagation (Single-mode, Multi-mode), Refractive Index (Step-index, Graded-index), Interconnect Level, End-user Industry and Region – Global Forecast to 2028" The optical waveguide industry is projected to grow from USD 6.6 billion in 2023 and is projected to reach USD 9.5 billion by 2028; it is expected to grow at a CAGR of 7.3% from 2023

headline: Is Corning Incorporated (GLW) A Good Stock To Buy Now?
